inputs.label: Current Traditional IRA Balance
inputs.businessContext: Total pre-tax balance in traditional IRA account before conversion.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total pre-tax balance in traditional IRA account before conversion.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Dönüşüm öncesi geleneksel IRA hesabındaki toplam vergi öncesi bakiye.

inputs.label: Amount to Convert
inputs.businessContext: Portion of the traditional IRA balance to convert to a Roth IRA; cannot exceed currentBalance.

businessContext_i18n.en: Portion of the traditional IRA balance to convert to a Roth IRA; cannot exceed currentBalance.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Roth IRA'ya dönüştürülecek geleneksel IRA bakiyesinin kısmı; currentBalance değerini aşamaz.

inputs.label: Current Marginal Tax Rate
inputs.businessContext: Expected income tax rate in the year of conversion, expressed as a percentage.

businessContext_i18n.en: Expected income tax rate in the year of conversion, expressed as a percentage.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Dönüşüm yılında beklenen gelir vergisi oranı, yüzde olarak ifade edilir.

inputs.label: Expected Retirement Tax Rate
inputs.businessContext: Estimated marginal tax rate during retirement when traditional IRA withdrawals will be taxed.

businessContext_i18n.en: Estimated marginal tax rate during retirement when traditional IRA withdrawals will be taxed.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Geleneksel IRA'dan çekimlerin vergilendirileceği emeklilik döneminde tahmini marjinal vergi oranı.

inputs.label: Years to Retirement
inputs.businessContext: Number of years until retirement, during which converted funds grow tax-free.

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of years until retirement, during which converted funds grow tax-free.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Emekliliğe kalan yıl sayısı, bu süre boyunca dönüştürülen fonlar vergisiz büyür.

inputs.label: Expected Annual Return
inputs.businessContext: Assumed average annual investment return before inflation.

businessContext_i18n.en: Assumed average annual investment return before inflation.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Enflasyon öncesi varsayılan ortalama yıllık yatırım getirisi.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
